name: Non-Fat Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh or frozen blueberries (thaw if frozen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Spray twelve 2 to 2 1/2 inch muffin pan cups.
3. In a large bowl, sift flour with baking soda, powder and salt.
4. In a medium-sized bowl, beat egg whites and milk.
5. Add sugar, then the egg mixture into the large bowl. Blend thoroughly until combined (the mixture should be slightly lumpy).
6. Gently fold blueberries into the mixture.
7. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups about 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 18 to 22 minutes. Makes about 11-14 muffins, each containing approximately 130 calories and .05 grams of fat.
